narrative:
Blackcreek Township (precinct in Mercer County) has 382 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.9 percentage points.
